prompt: Generate the phrase “TODAY IS YOURS” using the 3D angle of the first image and the rainbow text coloring of the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate the phrase 'TODAY IS YOURS'. The text should adopt the bold, 3D extruded block lettering style and perspective from image 1. Apply a distinct, vibrant color to each letter, inspired by the multi-colored design of image 2.
objects: Perspective similar to Image 1 (angled, appearing to come forward)
Each letter displaying a distinct vibrant color
A contrasting color for the letter extrusion (e.g., light blue/cyan)
